title: androcalva fraseri
intro: Androcalva fraseri, also known as Fraser's heath, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a member of the Cunoniaceae family and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Androcalva fraseri has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is considered a valuable resource in traditional Australian medicine.
